narrative: Ransomware Sev-1 with confirmed data exfiltration of 2.3 TB customer PII. Confirmed data exfil — must escalate to IC and legal immediately. Preparation: no runbook for this scenario. Detection: alerted after 14 hours of dwell. Containment ineffective — encryption ongoing across two domains; must expand isolation scope. Eradication delayed. Recovery: backups partially encrypted. Notifications missed: regulatory clock started at discovery, no GDPR 72-hour notification filed for EU data subjects, no SEC 4-business-day 8-K, no state breach notifications. Evidence chain of custody not preserved; logs purged. No lessons-learned scheduled.
